title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving platform stability and reliability for RevOps teams. OpsPal now automatically cleans up outdated plugin configurations and missing dependencies when you start sessions, preventing common startup errors. The platform also gained smarter Salesforce protections, including better handling of Dynamic Forms and automatic record type assignments.

entries.headline: Platform automatically removes outdated plugins when starting sessions
Improved Salesforce startup process removes outdated configurations
details: Platform now cleans up old data quality monitoring settings
Better organization of Salesforce quality and architecture monitoring tools

entries.headline: Enhanced Salesforce protections prevent common configuration errors
details: Prevents field additions when Salesforce Dynamic Forms is active
Automatically assigns new record types to administrator profiles
Reduces session interruptions from routing conflicts

entries.headline: Platform automatically installs missing components during session startup
details: Shows clear error messages when installations fail
Provides step-by-step instructions to fix dependency issues manually

entries.headline: Resolved false error messages about missing platform components
